name: Recipe Community
description: AI-powered recipe sharing platform with community feed, photo-to-recipe AI generation, chef chat, cookbook collections, and social cooking features.
personality: Warm, appetite-driven recipe community with rich food photography as the visual anchor. Earthy tones with pops of warm orange and herb green. Card-based recipe feeds with generous image ratios. Friendly rounded shapes and soft shadows. AI features (photo-to-recipe, chef chat) feel like helpful kitchen companions, not cold tech. Community interactions are encouraging and celebratory.

voice.tone: Warm, enthusiastic, and encouraging. Speaks like a friend who loves to cook. Uses sensory language when describing food.
voice.empty_states: Inviting and appetizing. An empty cookbook should inspire the user to save their first recipe, not feel like an error. Use food-related metaphors.
voice.errors: Gentle and understanding. If a recipe upload fails, offer to retry. Keep the kitchen metaphor alive without being cheesy.
voice.loading: Recipe card skeletons with image placeholders showing a subtle plate outline. Shimmer animation in warm tones.
